allow: PowerShell($p = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "node running: " + \($p.Id -join ', '\) } else { "NO node process — dev server failed to start" }; "---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 | Format-Table -AutoSize)
